description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with the default condaforge/linux-anvil-cos7-x86_64 image, stages start, stop, build, test, and deploy, and a PACKAGE_VERSION variable. In the build stage add a build job that runs `mkdir -p "${CI_PROJECT_DIR}/conda-bld"` then `conda build "${CI_PROJECT_DIR}/.conda" --output-folder "${CI_PROJECT_DIR}/conda-bld"` and stores the conda-bld directory as an artifact. In the test stage add a test job that runs `conda create -n test -q -c file://${CI_PROJECT_DIR}/conda-bld "python=3.9" ${CI_PROJECT_NAME}`, `conda activate test`, `uniparc_xml_parser --help`, `mkdir package/`, `cp $(which uniparc_xml_parser) package/` and uploads the package/ directory as an artifact, and a pages job that runs `conda create -n test -q -c file://${CI_PROJECT_DIR}/conda-bld "python=3.9"`, `conda activate test`, `python -m pip install -r docs/requirements.txt`, `mkdocs build docs` and publishes the public/ folder as a pages artifact. In the start stage add a create-bigquery job (ubuntu:20.04) that installs ssh and Google Cloud SDK, rsyncs data from a remote host, and runs multiple `bq load` commands to populate BigQuery tables, executing only when the $CREATE_BIGQUERY variable is set, and a generate-parquet-files job (ubuntu:20.04) that installs Miniforge, downloads the uniparc XML via FTP, runs `uniparc_xml_parser` and several `python ../scripts/csv_to_parquet.py` conversions, then rsyncs the resulting parquet files to shared storage, running only when $UPDATE_TABLES is set with 3tb tags and specific Kubernetes resource limits. In the stop stage add a destroy-bigquery job (ubuntu:20.04) that removes the same BigQuery tables with `bq rm` commands, runs only when $CREATE_BIGQUERY is set, and is delayed by 2 days. In the deploy stage add deploy-cargo (runs `cargo publish --no-verify`), deploy-conda (runs `anaconda -t $ANACONDA_TOKEN upload $CI_PROJECT_DIR/conda-bld/*/*.tar.bz2 -u ostrokach-forge --no-progress`), and deploy-package (runs a `curl --header "JOB-TOKEN: $CI_JOB_TOKEN" --upload-file $CI_PROJECT_DIR/package/uniparc_xml_parser "${CI_API_V4_URL}/projects/${CI_PROJECT_ID}/packages/generic/${CI_PROJECT_NAME}/${PACKAGE_VERSION}/uniparc_xml_parser"`) jobs, each triggered only on Git tags.
